'''lakozo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:caballito|caballito]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-k-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:caballito|caballito]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| lakozo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:lækezeth|lækezeth]] || [[word:lækezej|lækezej]] || [[word:lækezesh|lækezesh]] || [[word:lækeze|lækeze]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lakokozoth|lakokozoth]] || [[word:lakokozoj|lakokozoj]] || [[word:lakokozosh|lakokozosh]] || [[word:lakokozo|lakokozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lakozoth|lakozoth]] || [[word:lakozoj|lakozoj]] || [[word:lakozosh|lakozosh]] || [[word:lakozo|lakozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lakofzoth|lakofzoth]] || [[word:lakofzoj|lakofzoj]] || [[word:lakofzosh|lakofzosh]] || [[word:lakofzof|lakofzof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lakozotho|lakozotho]] || [[word:lakozojo|lakozojo]] || [[word:lakozosho|lakozosho]] || [[word:lakozoko|lakozoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lakozoth|lakozoth]] || [[word:lakozoj|lakozoj]] || [[word:lakozosh|lakozosh]] || [[word:lakozo|lakozo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lakozothol|lakozothol]] || [[word:lakozojol|lakozojol]] || [[word:lakozoshol|lakozoshol]] || [[word:lakozokol|lakozokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lakozothotho|lakozothotho]] || [[word:lakozojojo|lakozojojo]] || [[word:lakozoshosho|lakozoshosho]] || [[word:lakozoko|lakozoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lakozothon|lakozothon]] || [[word:lakozojon|lakozojon]] || [[word:lakozoshon|lakozoshon]] || [[word:lakozokon|lakozokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lakozothoro|lakozothoro]] || [[word:lakozojoro|lakozojoro]] || [[word:lakozoshoro|lakozoshoro]] || [[word:lakozokoro|lakozokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
